selected_topic: Rare Indian Giant Flying Squirrel Spotted in Uttarakhand's Ramnagar After Nearly 12 years
news_angle: A rare Indian Giant Flying Squirrel was recently spotted for the first time in nearly 12 years after it entered a villager’s house and was safely rescued to be released back into the wild.
why_this_is_news: It’s a rare wildlife sighting of an elusive nocturnal species, marking a significant local conservation moment after a long absence. The safe rescue offers a hopeful glimpse into wildlife-human coexistence.
specific_action: was spotted inside a home in Uttarakhand and safely rescued for release
scene_metaphor: Hunk Mao dressed as an adventurous night-time guardian, swooping through a stylized forest rooftop cityscape under a glowing moon, spotting a glowing silhouette of the giant flying squirrel perched on a tree branch nearby.
image_prompt: Stylized anime scene with an energetic orange tabby cat character (Hunk Mao) in a black hoodie and cap, expressive oversized eyes, mischievous confident grin, and sharp tabby markings, leaping dynamically over rooftops at night with a full moon. Nearby, a glowing Indian Giant Flying Squirrel with vibrant fur and large eyes clings to a tree branch. The setting is a lush forest edge near a village, blending natural and urban elements with cool cinematic lighting and a whimsical adventurous vibe.

caption: A rare Indian Giant Flying Squirrel was found inside a home after 12 years and safely rescued for release. Hunk Mao’s latest night patrol just got a new flying friend to watch over!
risk_notes: Ensure the flying squirrel is depicted with clear animal features distinct from Hunk Mao. Avoid logos or real persons. Scene stays fictional and adventurous without implying real person involvement.
